action.reasoning: Observation: iter 16 eval produced test MAE 0.0816, best so far. Remaining time budget is only 0.0056 hours (~20 seconds), which is insufficient for any training or improvement. Decision: end experiment with the current best checkpoint (MAE 0.0816).
